name: Quince
description: Voted a top rooftop restaurant, it offers hip international cuisine with panoramic view of the Parroquia
address: Cuna de Allende 15, Zona Centro, Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Mama Mia
description: Live entertainment up front & mid-section, nice fire pits in back and rooftop
address: Calle del Dr. Ignacio Hernández Macías 91, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: La Siena Gorda
description: Family restaurant with good food and drinks; beautiful courtyard seating; next time want to try the tableside mussels which looked & smelled great! (Note signage for the place is not obvious, you need to walk back into the courtyard area to the hostess stand and enter the restaurant)
address: Umarán 8 Interior 3, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Los Milagros
description: Must get one of the Mocajetes (for 2 people)
address: Relox 17, Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Tio Lucas
description: Excellent steak house, a favorite. Food was good and the live entertainment was phenominal - defintely worth going after 6:30-7:00 to listen!
address: Mesones 103, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: El Pegaso
address: Corregidora 6, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Hcho en Mexico
address: Ancha de San Antonio 8, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Mare Nostrum
description: Excellent Italian seafood and pasta dishes
address: Umarán 56, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Orquidea Thai
address: Zacateros 83, Zona Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Andy's Pastor Taco Cart
description: On Avenida Insurgentes, just down the street from the Bibliotecha (library)
address: Avenida Insurgentes 85, Zona Centro, San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Lolita's
description: Great Mexican food and super-friendly staff (but no English); try out the tableside Guac with pork rinds! This is Uyen and my go-to place on our first nights in SMA after the long flight.
address: Salida a Celaya 52, Zona Centro, 37760 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Hamburguesas las Aguacatosas
description: Cheap burgers and awesome french fries; burgers can be a bit messy to eat with the avocado sliding around, but very tasty and inexpensive
address: Salida a Celaya 94, San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Brasimix Tacos
description: Cheap tacos, quesadillas, tostadas, and other Mexican treats; staff does not speak English, but ordering is easy.
address: Salida a Celaya 20A, Zona Centro, 37754 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Asia Orient Express
description: May be the best Asian restaurant in SMA, but food is just so-so; rice and dishes tend to be a little sweeter than what you would expect for Asian food
address: Salida a Celaya 6 Interior 5, Zona Centro, San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: Tostevere
description: Great small shareable dishes and unique cocktails; favorite place we typically visit at least once during our trips
address: Codo 4, Col. Centro, 37700 San Miguel de Allende, Gto., Mexico

name: (Italian Place)
description: Decent Italian food and drinks; some dishes are better than others

name: Marulier
description: Great breakfast from French pastries to hotcakes, french toast, sandwiches, fruit plates, and more.  Right next to the Organic market (which is open on Friday and Saturday)
address: Ancha de San Antonio 121, San Antonio, 37750 San Miguel de Allende, Gto.
